actionsDialog.row.selectionOpacity.rustPath: ActionsPopupRowTokens.selection_opacity — read into fallback style, never passed to ListItem

actionsDialog.section.paddingTop.rustPath: ActionsPopupSectionTokens.padding_top — section renderer centers vertically instead

agentChat.assistant.radius.rustPath: AgentChatMessageStyle(assistant).radius — 0; assistant bg only paints when bg_alpha > 0

agentChat.fixture.kitchenSinkCwd.rustPath: style_contract::AGENT_CHAT_KITCHEN_SINK_FIXTURE_CWD — pinned long path so reference captures are byte-reproducible and exercise clipped context lanes without visible overlap

agentChat.footer.presentation.rustPath: render_native_main_window_footer_spacer for surface "agent_chat" — the GPUI band is EMPTY in captures; button truth needs an activeFooter probe

agentChat.user.maxWidthRoleSplitOnly.rustPath: AgentChatMessageStyle(user).max_width — applied ONLY under RoleSplit presentation

confirmPrompt.stack.maxWidth.rustPath: crate::confirm::CONFIRM_PROMPT_BODY_MAX_WIDTH_PX (body max_w; title is intrinsic — see conflict)

dayPage.header.contextInteraction.rustPath: render_inert_main_view_context_zone (src/app_impl/ui_window.rs) — same chips, no-op handlers, NO keycaps

dayPage.shelf.hiddenWhenEmpty.rustPath: DayPageView::render_clipboard_shelf — returns None when clipboard_shelf is empty

settingsHub.census.optionalPredicate.rustPath: crate::window_state::has_custom_positions via the bin-side get_settings_items wrapper

settingsHub.icons.resolvedRowIconCount.rustPath: IconKind::from_icon_hint over get_settings_items_for(true) — authored hints currently never parse

values.protocol layout model: content at (0,0), title slot y=189, footer host 38
values.renderer + pixels: context header 38 above a fixed-500 shell; stack centers on the shell's flex region; footer band = rail 32 at the window bottom

conflicts.explanation: getLayoutInfo's confirm branch reports content-local coordinates that ignore the main context header and reserve a 38px footer. Pixel measurement of the 2026-07-11 capture places the title ~59pt lower than the model claims. Trust the renderer + raster, not the synthetic model, until the model is fixed.
The renderer's title/body gap is padding_md (12); the protocol layout model hardcodes 16. Cross-capture pixel measurement confirms 12.
The renderer never sets line heights; GPUI's default phi() line height (rounded) applies. Body line spacing measured at exactly 23.0pt.
Multiple footer heights coexist. The confirm capture's visible band starts at window bottom minus the 32px rail; the protocol model's 38 has no renderer authority.
Native AppKit insets the shared 84px action slots into 78px visible frames. Do not rewrite slot tokens from measured frames.

values.selected footer fill: neutral text-primary at the footer active byte

conflicts.explanation: Danger affects only the title color; the focused Delete button paints the neutral shared footer active fill, not red.

values.layout model: stack/title/body all reported as x=95 w=560
values.renderer: no stack wrapper; title intrinsic width; body max_w 560

conflicts.explanation: The 560px reading column exists only as the body's max width; the title is intrinsic-width centered. The model's uniform 560 boxes are synthetic.
Reference-capture hues drift from stock bytes via color profile and vibrancy blending. Geometry stays blocking; hue does not.
The action row wrapper constrains the shared ListItem into a 36px slot; the inherited main-menu item height (44) and legacy constant (40) never paint here.
The renderer never applies the configured actions row radius; the shared ListItem paints the main-menu radius (14). HTML must paint 14.
The actions selection opacity is read into a fallback style but never passed to ListItem; the painted selected fill is the shared component byte #FFFFFF20.
Actual hover uses the shared row resolver's component floor, not the actions hover opacity field.
The actions section renderer consumes height, X padding, font and color but not the declared vertical padding fields.
Action-row shortcut keycaps are painted by the shared footer-chrome renderer; the mockup must reuse .sk-keycap and footer keycap tokens, not invent actions-specific duplicates.

The 32px popup footer height survives in generic sizing paths but is forbidden for the normal actions dialog; the visible bottom band is list padding (6) plus shell border reserve (2), sharing the shell material — not a footer.

The devtools reference capture's caret does not visually match the stock amber accent. Never overwrite the stock token from a PNG sample; retake the capture under the stock profile or treat caret hue as non-blocking.
One-byte alpha differences are possible between truncating and rounding helpers; the exporter calls the dialog's own truncating path.

The layout model reserves 28px for the Notes footer while the painted universal action-button row is 32px: autosize and the layout oracle under-reserve the visible band by 4px. The 280px default-height fixture masks it (initial-height floor). Mockups must paint the 32px resolved truth; do NOT change NotesWindowStyle.footer_height here — that would be an app behavior fix, not a contract record.

Notes derives its 32px button row from HINT_STRIP_HEIGHT while the exported shared --sk-footer-button-height derives from the main window's native footer host. The numbers coincide (both 36-hosted) but the provenance differs; Notes has NO native 36px footer host — its footer is an in-window GPUI strip (notes.footer.presentation).

values.observed raster: heading glyph tops clipped in the 2026-07-11 reference capture
values.resolved title style: bold (weight 700) at the shared 16px editor size — no capture font-size exists (gpui HighlightStyle is uniformly sized)

conflicts.explanation: Bold markdown title runs paint inside the Input's fixed 20px line box and their upper glyph area clips. Expected consequence of the Input primitive, but a screen-level renderer defect — the heading is NOT a larger nominal font size (same mono advance as body lines). Mockups must reproduce the clip via the line box, never by inflating the heading font.

render_section_header ignores the themed main-menu metrics and paints the LEGACY default_main_menu() first-section branch: the settings 'Settings' separator occupies a 26px slot with 6px top padding while themed rows paint 44px. The global sectionHeader.slotVsLegacy conflict compares the NON-first slots (32 vs 28) and does not capture this. Mockups must consume --sk-list-item-default-first-section-* for this separator, never the --sk-main-menu-first-section-* pair.

values.authored icon hints: 12 rows / 11 distinct hints (11 rows / 10 distinct without Reset Window Positions)
values.painted: icon slot omitted; row text origin 18px (outer 4 + inner 14)

conflicts.explanation: get_settings_items authors lucide-style icon hints, but icon_name_from_str recognizes none of them and the ASCII content rejects the emoji fallback, so every settings row paints ICONLESS — a real configuration/renderer mismatch, not an environmental difference. Present-tense conflict: when the parser learns these names (or settings adopts recognized ones), delete this record, add icons to the mockup, shift the 18px name origins, and regenerate the reference receipt in the same change. Locked by settings_hub_contract_behavior::authored_icon_hints_resolve_to_zero_row_icons.

Two live code paths advertise different verbs for the same Enter on the settings hub: the native AppKit footer says Run while the in-window GPUI fallback hint strip says Open. Recorded, not collapsed; only a live activeFooter probe determines what the composed surface shows.

The Day Page GPUI layer reserves the 32px footer rail (render_native_main_window_footer_spacer = current_main_menu_footer_height) while the native AppKit footer HOST band is modeled at 36px. The footer height ladder continues — do NOT 'fix' either value in the exporter; painted truth for the bottom band needs an activeFooter probe + pixel check.

The error background alpha is authored as decimal 50 while every sibling alpha is hex-authored — a real edit foot-gun. Recorded, not normalized; the shared pack_rgb_alpha resolver rounds it to 0x32 either way.

values.Standard presentation: full-width rows; max_width applies only under RoleSplit, assistant bg only when bg_alpha > 0

conflicts.explanation: Real source controls that are variant-limited: exported as JSON-only facts with no CSS variable so the Standard mockup cannot consume phantom geometry, and the workbench cannot advertise edits that paint nothing on this screen.
Script-driven arg prompts open from the MINI launcher and clamp to 5 model rows (279); the full-mode ArgPromptWithChoices model reserves 319.
The input host paints a 1.25×font line box (25px @ 20px font), not the CURSOR_HEIGHT_LG 22px model; the painted header band is 41px.
Resize model reserves 40px/row but InfoBarBase paints 44px — the 6th choice clips under a full list. Recorded, not smoothed.
ARG_LIST_PADDING_Y is counted in height_for_view but the arg list paints no pad.
Model FOOTER_HEIGHT 30 vs painted native spacer 32 vs main-menu host 36.
The themed main-menu path (from_main_menu_def) paints 44px rows; the legacy constant still says 40px and is used by non-themed surfaces.
Themed section slot is 28px; the legacy constant is 32px.
The IconTile row paints the component alpha byte (0x20 ≈ 12.5% white), not theme.opacity.selected (20%). Editing the theme opacity will not change the launcher's selected row.
